name: Creature Card Idle
short_description: Creature Card Idle is an incremental game that fuses strategic grid-based gameplay with the thrill of collecting cards. Experience an evolving journey across expansions, each introducing new mechanics and cards. Play for free without microtransactions.
detailed_description:
The hit web game finally comes to Steam, complete with achievements & cloud saves. Now with NO ads and NO microtransactions! Play all the content for free forever, including the base game and its three expansions.

Named one of the best games in the genre by gaming site PCGamesN, and one of the winners of Kongregate's November 2019 game competition, this is a incremental game where you place cards strategically on a grid to generate resources, and you spend those resources to purchase booster packs containing new cards.

Once you have enough resources, unlock the next expansion. Each expansion is its own little idle game that adds new mechanics and new cards to the mix, ensuring the game never gets stale. Later expansions change the formula even more, featuring RPG-like battle mechanics.

Features deep mechanics with various card synergies and many deck possibilities. The game is 100% strategic idler and 0% clicker, so you won't break your mouse playing.
